content: Ultimate Vault Hunter Upgrade Pack Two: Digistruct Peak Challenge
name: Legendary Gunzerker
description: Legendary Gunzerker is a legendary class mod for Salvador in Borderlands 2. Manufactured by Torgue.
notes:
Introduced with Ultimate Vault Hunter Upgrade Pack 2 (Digistruct Peak) and unavailable without that add-on.

Not to be confused with the Legendary Berserker class mod.

Its red text is a quote from the 1987 film Dirty Dancing.

special.description: At max level: +55% action skill cooldown rate.
special.title: "Nobody puts this baby in a corner."
